task_prompt: Run all R scripts files. Skip any computationally expensive simulations (e.g., powerSim, bootstrapping).
tasks: From Study 1 results (Model 1 - Figure 1a), what is the effect of round in the phase on contributions to the public good? Only report the number rounded to two decimal places.

From Study 1 results (Model 2), what is the standard error for the effect of information-sharing on t2 contributions after controlling for group cooperation at t1? Only report the number rounded to two decimal places.

From Study 2 results (Model 1 - Figure 3b), what is the coefficient for full information networks compared to sparse networks without information-sharing? Only report the number rounded to two decimal places.
From Study 2 results (Model 1), is it true that the difference between information-sharing with evaluative content and the full information phase is significant at p < 0.05? Report only Yes or No
